p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { (x0 - x1).abs < x2 = x0.is_close(x1, x2) }(y, x, eps)

p.c: function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real) { (x1 ∈ x0 and exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_close(x1, k0) or x2 ∈ x0 } }) = is_interior_point(x0, x1) }(t, x)
not is_interior_point(t, x) or (x ∈ t and exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, k0) or x0 ∈ t } })
